task: #63 Optimize qwen35moe GGUF decode to PARO range
summary: Implemented correctness-safe raw-byte pack8 decode kernels for GGUF Q8_0/Q5_K/Q6_K, Q4_K raw selected gate+up dual kernels, and Q8_0 raw shared gate+up dual dispatch. 512/128 graph decode improves from 49.864 to 62.526 tok/s (+25.39%) and prefill improves from 99.898 to 107.001 tok/s, but the PARO/~100 tok/s decode target is not met; task #63 remains blocked/open.

hardware.gpu: attached RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 in this session; project default claims remain W7900/gfx1100 unless separately verified

software.git_status_at_artifact:
## gguf-bulk-prefill
 M hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_k_gemv.hip
 M hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_k_gemv.py
 M hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_q4_k_gemv.hip
 M hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_q4_k_gemv.py
 M hipengine/runtime/gguf_linear.py
 M hipengine/runtime/qwen35_gguf_runner.py

changes: Added raw-byte pack8 Q8_0/Q5_K/Q6_K GEMV kernels for rows=1 decode and selected expert down paths; no packed sidecar residency required.
Routed raw GGUF decode linear dispatch through pack8 variants for Q8_0 hidden projections and Q6_K lm_head/output when out_features is divisible by 8.
Added Q4_K raw selected dual gate+up kernel for decode (x_rows==1 only) to halve gate/up dispatches while preserving reduction order.
Added Q8_0 raw dual gate+up dispatch for shared expert gate/up; retained graph replay path.

rocprof.method: Like task #62, final profile subtracts a 512-token prefill-only trace from a 512/128 eager decode trace by kernel name to get exact 128-token decode dispatch counts; graph replay wall timing is from the 3-run benchmark.

rejected_or_limited_iterations.name: Q4_K raw selected pack8 for gate/up
rejected_or_limited_iterations.result: Rejected from dispatch path: it was correctness-safe but slower than Q4 raw single/dual for decode (one-run graph decode 56.887 tok/s before Q4 dual; rocprof showed 951 ms in Q4 raw-pack8 gate/up vs 754 ms with raw-dual). Kernel/wrapper remains available only as an unused experiment.

rejected_or_limited_iterations.name: Q4_K selected dual first attempt
rejected_or_limited_iterations.result: Rejected until fixed: back-to-back reduce_block_sum calls reused shared scratch without an inter-reduction barrier and broke parity at layer 1. Added __syncthreads() between reductions; bulk parity is exact after the fix.

rejected_or_limited_iterations.name: Use Q4 dual for bulk prefill rows
rejected_or_limited_iterations.result: Limited to x_rows==1 decode only. The dual raw one-output kernel slowed long-prompt prefill; bulk prefill keeps the previous row-bulk raw path.

blocker.summary: The retained optimization is a meaningful +25.4% decode gain, but still needs 1.60x to reach 100 tok/s and 1.86x to reach the PARO 116.05 tok/s row. The final profile still spends 742.7 ms/128 tokens in selected Q4 raw-dual gate/up, 471.0 ms in Q8 raw-pack8, 363.5 ms in selected Q5 raw-pack8 down, 348.8 ms in attention/cache, and 198.1 ms in lm_head Q6 raw-pack8. Raw-byte pack8 reduced some bottlenecks, but raw Q4 expert gate/up remains a major limiter without a resident packed/sidecar decode memory plan.
next_actions: Implement a resident packed Q4 expert decode path without exceeding the 24 GiB budget, likely by omitting raw expert weights or packing only hot decode tensors with raw fallback replaced.
Implement tiled/grouped selected expert decode that reuses expert rows across top-k and reduces the 40-dispatch/token Q4 gate/up and 40-dispatch/token down path.
Add tensor-name profiling for Q8_0 family and target the largest subfamilies beyond shared gate/up; raw-pack8 still leaves 170 Q8 dispatches/token.
Optimize full-attention/cache only after MoE/Q8/lm_head, or port a faster decode attention microkernel if MoE work stalls.
